# DRPCSharp - AI Developer Reference

## Overview

DRPCSharp is a modern C# library for Discord Rich Presence integration. This document provides comprehensive guidance for AI developers working with the library, including architectural decisions, best practices, and detailed API references.

## Architecture Philosophy

### Design Principles
1. **Async-First**: All I/O operations are async by default
2. **Immutable Data**: Presence snapshots are immutable for thread safety
3. **Explicit Boundaries**: Clear separation between transport, protocol, and business logic
4. **Testable**: Built with dependency injection and test doubles in mind
5. **Fail Fast**: Validation happens early with clear error messages

### Layer Responsibilities

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    Application Layer                       │
│  Your code using DRPCSharp for Rich Presence              │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                   DRPCSharp.Core                           │
│  - Connection lifecycle management                        │
│  - Event handling and state transitions                   │
│  - Public API surface (DrpcSharpClient)                 │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                   DRPCSharp.Model                          │
│  - Strongly typed presence data structures               │
│  - Validation logic and business rules                    │
│  - Immutable record types                                 │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                   DRPCSharp.Protocol                       │
│  - Internal payload structures                           │
│  - JSON serialization for Discord                        │
│  - Version compatibility handling                       │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                   DRPCSharp.Transport                      │
│  - IPC transport implementation                          │
│  - Connection management and reconnection                 │
│  - Error handling and recovery                          │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Core API Reference

### DrpcSharpClient

The main entry point for all Discord Rich Presence operations.

```csharp
public sealed class DrpcSharpClient : IAsyncDisposable, IDisposable
{
    // Properties
    public ConnectionState State { get; }
    public bool IsConnected { get; }
    public PresenceSnapshot? CurrentPresence { get; }
    
    // Events
    public event EventHandler<ConnectionStateChangedEventArgs>? ConnectionStateChanged;
    public event EventHandler<PresenceUpdatedEventArgs>? PresenceUpdated;
    public event EventHandler<TransportErrorEventArgs>? ErrorOccurred;
    
    // Methods
    public ValueTask ConnectAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    public ValueTask DisconnectAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    public ValueTask SetPresenceAsync(PresenceSnapshot presence, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
}
```

#### Connection State Management

```csharp
// State transitions are managed automatically:
// Disconnected -> Connecting -> Connected
// Connected -> Disconnecting -> Disconnected
// Error recovery: Connected -> Disconnected -> Connecting -> Connected

client.ConnectionStateChanged += (sender, args) =>
{
    switch (args.CurrentState)
    {
        case ConnectionState.Connected:
            // Ready to send presence updates
            break;
        case ConnectionState.Disconnected:
            // Connection lost, may retry
            break;
        case ConnectionState.Connecting:
            // Establishing connection
            break;
        case ConnectionState.Disconnecting:
            // Cleaning up connection
            break;
    }
};
```

### PresenceSnapshot

Immutable record representing Discord Rich Presence data.

```csharp
public sealed record PresenceSnapshot
{
    public string? Details { get; init; }           // Line 1: Main activity description
    public string? State { get; init; }            // Line 2: Secondary status
    public PresenceAssets? Assets { get; init; }   // Images and tooltips
    public PresenceParty? Party { get; init; }     // Party size and capacity
    public PresenceSecrets? Secrets { get; init; }  // Join/spectate functionality
    public IReadOnlyList<PresenceButton> Buttons { get; init; }
    public PresenceStatus Status { get; init; }
    public DateTimeOffset? StartedAt { get; init; }
    public DateTimeOffset? EndsAt { get; init; }
}
```

#### Discord Rich Presence Display Format

```
Playing "Your Application Name"     <- Automatic (Line 0)
Main Activity Description             <- Details field (Line 1)
Secondary Status | Party Info        <- State + Party (Line 2)
[Image] [Buttons]                     <- Assets + Buttons (Line 3)
```

### PresenceAssets

```csharp
public sealed record PresenceAssets
{
    public string? LargeImageKey { get; init; }   // 1024x1024 recommended
    public string? LargeImageText { get; init; }  // Tooltip for large image
    public string? SmallImageKey { get; init; }   // 512x512 recommended
    public string? SmallImageText { get; init; }  // Tooltip for small image
}
```

**Asset Guidelines:**
- Upload assets through Discord Developer Portal → Rich Presence → Art Assets
- Recommended size: 1024×1024 pixels for large, 512×512 for small
- Format: PNG with transparency support
- Maximum 300 assets per application
- Asset keys are case-sensitive

### PresenceParty

```csharp
public sealed record PresenceParty
{
    public string Id { get; init; }               // Unique party identifier
    public int Size { get; init; }                // Current party size
    public int MaxSize { get; init; }              // Maximum party capacity
}
```

**Display Format:** `"State text (Size of MaxSize)"`

### PresenceSecrets

```csharp
public sealed record PresenceSecrets
{
    public string? JoinSecret { get; init; }       // Enables "Join" button
    public string? SpectateSecret { get; init; }   // Enables "Spectate" button
    public string? MatchSecret { get; init; }    // Match-specific secret
}
```

**Important:** Secrets enable game invite functionality. They should be:
- Unique per session/party
- Cryptographically secure
- Not contain sensitive user data
- Properly validated on your backend

### PresenceButton

```csharp
public sealed record PresenceButton
{
    public string Label { get; init; }            // Button text (max 32 chars)
    public string Url { get; init; }                // Must be valid absolute URL
}
```

**Limitations:**
- Maximum 2 buttons per presence
- URLs must be absolute (https://example.com)
- Labels limited to 32 characters
- URLs must use HTTPS (HTTP not supported)

## Transport Layer

### IDrpcSharpTransport Interface

```csharp
public interface IDrpcSharpTransport
{
    bool IsConnected { get; }
    event EventHandler<TransportErrorEventArgs>? ErrorOccurred;
    
    ValueTask ConnectAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    ValueTask DisconnectAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    ValueTask SetPresenceAsync(PresenceUpdateRequest request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
}
```

### Built-in Transports

#### DiscordIpcTransport
Production-ready transport using named pipes for Discord IPC communication.

```csharp
var options = new DiscordIpcTransportOptions
{
    PipeName = "discord-ipc-0",                    // Usually automatic
    ConnectionTimeout = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(15),  // Connection timeout
    RetryCount = 3,                               // Retry attempts
    RetryDelay = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(1)          // Delay between retries
};

var transport = new DiscordIpcTransport("app-id", options);
```

#### InMemoryTransport
For unit testing and development. Records all operations for verification.

```csharp
var transport = new InMemoryTransport();
var client = new DrpcSharpClient(transport);

// After operations:
Assert.True(transport.Connected);
Assert.NotNull(transport.LastPresenceUpdate);
Assert.Equal("Test Details", transport.LastPresenceUpdate.Details);
```

#### NoOpTransport
For testing scenarios where transport operations should be ignored.

```csharp
var transport = new NoOpTransport();
var client = new DrpcSharpClient(transport);
// All operations succeed but do nothing
```

## Validation Rules

DRPCSharp validates all data before sending to Discord. Here are the validation rules:

### PresenceSnapshot Validation
```csharp
public void Validate()
{
    // Timestamps must be chronological
    if (StartedAt.HasValue && EndsAt.HasValue && EndsAt < StartedAt)
        throw new ArgumentException("EndsAt must be on or after StartedAt.");
    
    // Party size validation
    if (Party != null)
    {
        if (Party.Size < 1)
            throw new ArgumentException("Party size must be positive.");
        if (Party.Size > Party.MaxSize)
            throw new ArgumentException("Party size cannot exceed MaxSize.");
    }
    
    // Button limits
    if (Buttons.Count > 2)
        throw new ArgumentException("Buttons cannot contain more than two entries.");
    
    // Validate all nested objects
    Assets?.Validate();
    Party?.Validate();
    Secrets?.Validate();
    
    foreach (var button in Buttons)
        button.Validate();
}
```

### Individual Field Validation

**Details & State:**
- Maximum 128 characters each
- Cannot contain newlines or control characters
- Unicode supported

**Party:**
- Size must be ≥ 1 and ≤ MaxSize
- MaxSize must be ≥ 1
- ID must not be empty

**Secrets:**
- Optional, but if provided must not be whitespace
- Maximum 128 characters each

**Buttons:**
- Label: 1-32 characters
- URL: Must be valid absolute URL with HTTPS

## Error Handling

### Transport Errors

```csharp
client.ErrorOccurred += (sender, args) =>
{
    var error = args.Exception;
    var operation = args.Operation; // Connect, Send, Receive
    var isRecoverable = args.IsRecoverable;
    
    if (!isRecoverable)
    {
        // Connection will be terminated
        logger.LogError(error, "Unrecoverable transport error");
    }
    else
    {
        // Library will attempt recovery
        logger.LogWarning(error, "Recoverable transport error");
    }
};
```

### Common Error Scenarios

**Connection Failures:**
- Discord not running → `TimeoutException`
- Invalid application ID → `AuthenticationException`
- IPC disabled → `InvalidOperationException`

**Presence Update Failures:**
- Not connected → `InvalidOperationException`
- Invalid data → `ArgumentException` (validation)
- Rate limiting → `RateLimitException`

**Transport Errors:**
- Pipe disconnected → `IOException` (recoverable)
- Discord crashed → `PipeException` (unrecoverable)
- Permission denied → `UnauthorizedAccessException`

## Testing Strategies

### Unit Testing with InMemoryTransport

```csharp
[TestClass]
public class GamePresenceServiceTests
{
    private InMemoryTransport _transport;
    private DrpcSharpClient _client;
    private GamePresenceService _service;
    
    [TestInitialize]
    public void Setup()
    {
        _transport = new InMemoryTransport();
        _client = new DrpcSharpClient(_transport);
        _service = new GamePresenceService(_client);
    }
    
    [TestMethod]
    public async Task UpdatePresence_WithValidGameState_UpdatesDiscord()
    {
        // Arrange
        var gameState = new GameState
        {
            PlayerName = "TestPlayer",
            Score = 100,
            Level = 5
        };
        
        // Act
        await _service.UpdatePresenceAsync(gameState);
        
        // Assert
        Assert.IsTrue(_transport.Connected);
        Assert.IsNotNull(_transport.LastPresenceUpdate);
        StringAssert.Contains(_transport.LastPresenceUpdate.Details, "TestPlayer");
    }
}
```

### Integration Testing

```csharp
[TestClass]
public class DiscordIntegrationTests
{
    private const string TestAppId = "1234567890123456789";
    
    [TestMethod]
    [TestCategory("Integration")]
    public async Task FullPresenceLifecycle_Success()
    {
        await using var client = DrpcSharpClientFactory.Create(TestAppId);
        
        // Connect
        await client.ConnectAsync();
        Assert.IsTrue(client.IsConnected);
        
        // Set presence
        await client.SetPresenceAsync(new PresenceSnapshot
        {
            Details = "Integration Test",
            State = "Running tests",
            StartedAt = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow
        });
        
        Assert.IsNotNull(client.CurrentPresence);
        
        // Disconnect
        await client.DisconnectAsync();
        Assert.IsFalse(client.IsConnected);
    }
}
```

## Performance Considerations

### Memory Management
- PresenceSnapshot is a record type (immutable)
- Transport reuses buffers where possible
- No allocations during steady-state operation
- Async operations use ValueTask for reduced allocations

### Connection Management
- Automatic reconnection with exponential backoff
- Connection pooling for multiple clients
- Configurable timeouts prevent resource leaks
- Graceful degradation when Discord unavailable

### Update Frequency
- Discord rate limits: ~5 updates per 20 seconds
- Recommended: Update every 15-30 seconds for dynamic content
- Use change detection to avoid unnecessary updates
- Batch updates when possible

## Advanced Scenarios

### Multi-Client Applications

```csharp
public class MultiGameService
{
    private readonly Dictionary<string, DrpcSharpClient> _clients = new();
    
    public async Task RegisterGameAsync(string gameId, string appId)
    {
        var client = DrpcSharpClientFactory.Create(appId);
        _clients[gameId] = client;
        await client.ConnectAsync();
    }
    
    public async Task UpdateGamePresenceAsync(string gameId, PresenceSnapshot presence)
    {
        if (_clients.TryGetValue(gameId, out var client))
        {
            await client.SetPresenceAsync(presence);
        }
    }
}
```

### Dynamic Asset Management

```csharp
public class AssetManager
{
    private readonly Dictionary<string, string> _assetCache = new();
    
    public PresenceAssets CreateAssetsForLevel(int level)
    {
        var largeKey = GetAssetKey($"level_{level}_background");
        var smallKey = GetAssetKey($"level_{level}_icon");
        
        return new PresenceAssets
        {
            LargeImageKey = largeKey,
            LargeImageText = $"Level {level}",
            SmallImageKey = smallKey,
            SmallImageText = $"Level {level} Icon"
        };
    }
    
    private string GetAssetKey(string baseName)
    {
        // Implement asset key resolution logic
        // This might involve uploading assets dynamically or using predefined keys
        return _assetCache.GetValueOrDefault(baseName, "default_asset");
    }
}
```

### Error Recovery Strategy

```csharp
public class ResilientPresenceService
{
    private readonly DrpcSharpClient _client;
    private readonly ILogger<ResilientPresenceService> _logger;
    private PresenceSnapshot? _lastSuccessfulPresence;
    
    public ResilientPresenceService(DrpcSharpClient client, ILogger<ResilientPresenceService> logger)
    {
        _client = client;
        _logger = logger;
        
        _client.ErrorOccurred += OnErrorOccurred;
        _client.ConnectionStateChanged += OnConnectionStateChanged;
    }
    
    public async Task UpdatePresenceAsync(PresenceSnapshot presence)
    {
        try
        {
            await _client.SetPresenceAsync(presence);
            _lastSuccessfulPresence = presence;
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            _logger.LogError(ex, "Failed to update presence");
            // Implement retry logic or fallback
        }
    }
    
    private async void OnConnectionStateChanged(object? sender, ConnectionStateChangedEventArgs e)
    {
        if (e.CurrentState == ConnectionState.Connected && _lastSuccessfulPresence != null)
        {
            // Re-send last presence after reconnection
            try
            {
                await _client.SetPresenceAsync(_lastSuccessfulPresence);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                _logger.LogError(ex, "Failed to restore presence after reconnection");
            }
        }
    }
}
```

## Security Considerations

### Secret Management
- Never hardcode secrets in your application
- Use secure random generation for join/spectate secrets
- Validate secrets on your backend before allowing joins
- Implement proper session management

### Rate Limiting
- Respect Discord's rate limits
- Implement backoff strategies
- Monitor for abuse patterns
- Log suspicious activity

### Input Validation
- All user input should be validated
- Sanitize strings to prevent injection
- Limit string lengths appropriately
- Validate URL formats for buttons

## Migration Guide

### From discord-rpc-csharp

```csharp
// Old API (discord-rpc-csharp)
var client = new DiscordRpcClient("appId");
client.Initialize();
client.SetPresence(new RichPresence
{
    Details = "Old Library",
    State = "Migrating..."
});

// New API (DRPCSharp)
await using var client = DrpcSharpClientFactory.Create("appId");
await client.ConnectAsync();
await client.SetPresenceAsync(new PresenceSnapshot
{
    Details = "New Library",
    State = "Migration complete!"
});
```

Key differences:
- Async/await throughout
- Immutable data structures
- Better error handling
- Cleaner API surface
- Built-in validation

## Common Patterns

### Presence Builder Pattern

```csharp
public class PresenceBuilder
{
    private string _details = "";
    private string _state = "";
    private PresenceAssets? _assets;
    private DateTimeOffset? _startTime;
    
    public PresenceBuilder WithDetails(string details)
    {
        _details = details;
        return this;
    }
    
    public PresenceBuilder WithState(string state)
    {
        _state = state;
        return this;
    }
    
    public PresenceBuilder WithAssets(string largeImage, string smallImage = null)
    {
        _assets = new PresenceAssets
        {
            LargeImageKey = largeImage,
            SmallImageKey = smallImage
        };
        return this;
    }
    
    public PresenceBuilder WithTimer(DateTimeOffset? startTime = null)
    {
        _startTime = startTime ?? DateTimeOffset.UtcNow;
        return this;
    }
    
    public PresenceSnapshot Build()
    {
        return new PresenceSnapshot
        {
            Details = _details,
            State = _state,
            Assets = _assets,
            StartedAt = _startTime
        };
    }
}

// Usage:
var presence = new PresenceBuilder()
    .WithDetails("Building something awesome")
    .WithState("Coding with DRPCSharp")
    .WithAssets("coding_icon")
    .WithTimer()
    .Build();
```

### Configuration Pattern

```csharp
public class DiscordPresenceConfiguration
{
    public string ApplicationId { get; set; } = "";
    public TimeSpan ConnectionTimeout { get; set; } = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(15);
    public int MaxRetries { get; set; } = 3;
    public bool EnableAutoReconnect { get; set; } = true;
    public LogLevel LogLevel { get; set; } = LogLevel.Information;
}

public static class DiscordPresenceFactory
{
    public static DrpcSharpClient CreateFromConfiguration(DiscordPresenceConfiguration config)
    {
        var options = new DiscordIpcTransportOptions
        {
            ConnectionTimeout = config.ConnectionTimeout,
            RetryCount = config.MaxRetries,
            EnableAutoReconnect = config.EnableAutoReconnect,
            LogLevel = config.LogLevel
        };
        
        return DrpcSharpClientFactory.Create(config.ApplicationId, options);
    }
}
```

## Troubleshooting for AI Developers

### Common Integration Issues

**"Client won't connect"**
1. Verify Discord is running
2. Check Game Activity is enabled in Discord settings
3. Confirm application ID is correct
4. Ensure no firewall blocking named pipes

**"Images not showing"**
1. Verify asset names match exactly (case-sensitive)
2. Check assets are uploaded to Discord application
3. Ensure image dimensions are correct (1024x1024)
4. Wait for Discord cache to update (30-60 seconds)

**"Presence updates failing"**
1. Check validation errors in exceptions
2. Verify client is connected before updating
3. Ensure data doesn't exceed Discord limits
4. Check for rate limiting (max 5 updates per 20 seconds)

### Debug Techniques

```csharp
// Enable detailed logging
var options = new DiscordIpcTransportOptions
{
    EnableDebugLogging = true,
    LogLevel = LogLevel.Debug
};

// Monitor all events
client.ConnectionStateChanged += (s, e) => Console.WriteLine($"State: {e.PreviousState} -> {e.CurrentState}");
client.PresenceUpdated += (s, e) => Console.WriteLine($"Presence: {e.Snapshot.Details}");
client.ErrorOccurred += (s, e) => Console.WriteLine($"Error: {e.Exception?.Message}");

// Use InMemoryTransport for debugging
var transport = new InMemoryTransport();
var client = new DrpcSharpClient(transport);
// Check transport.LastPresenceUpdate for sent data
```

## Performance Optimization

### Memory Optimization
```csharp
// Reuse presence objects when possible
private static readonly PresenceAssets _defaultAssets = new()
{
    LargeImageKey = "default_icon",
    LargeImageText = "My Application"
};

// Use object pooling for frequent updates
public class PresencePool
{
    private readonly ObjectPool<PresenceSnapshot.Builder> _pool;
    
    public PresencePool()
    {
        _pool = new DefaultObjectPool<PresenceSnapshot.Builder>(new BuilderPooledObjectPolicy());
    }
    
    public PresenceSnapshot.Builder Rent() => _pool.Get();
    public void Return(PresenceSnapshot.Builder builder) => _pool.Return(builder);
}
```

### Connection Pooling
```csharp
public class DiscordConnectionPool
{
    private readonly ConcurrentDictionary<string, DrpcSharpClient> _pool = new();
    
    public DrpcSharpClient GetOrCreateClient(string appId)
    {
        return _pool.GetOrAdd(appId, id =>
        {
            var client = DrpcSharpClientFactory.Create(id);
            client.ConnectAsync().ConfigureAwait(false);
            return client;
        });
    }
}
```

## Future Considerations

### Discord Social SDK Migration
The library is designed to support future Discord Social SDK integration:
- Transport abstraction allows SDK implementation
- Protocol layer can be extended for new features
- Model layer supports additional activity types

### New Discord Features
Architecture supports future Discord features:
- Activity types beyond "Playing"
- Rich presence for voice channels
- Advanced party management
- Cross-platform presence synchronization

---

**For AI Developers:** This library prioritizes developer experience, type safety, and maintainability. When generating code or suggesting improvements, maintain these principles and follow the established patterns.
